title: Audit Generation Coverage for Critical Network Controls

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Palo Alto Networks Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase 2757), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (Splunkbase 1621)
spl:
index=net (sourcetype=pan:traffic OR sourcetype=pan:threat) earliest=-24h
| stats earliest(_time) as first, latest(_time) as last, count by host, sourcetype
| eval gap_minutes=round((now()-strptime(last,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z"))/60,1)
| eval gap_minutes=if(isnull(gap_minutes), round((now()-last)/60,1), gap_minutes)
| where gap_minutes>30
value: Verifies that boundary devices continue generating audit records for allow/deny decisions, evidencing AU-12 audit generation for network events.
implementation: (1) Fix timestamp parsing per TA — sample `last` field; (2) tune gap threshold per HA pair; (3) alert if firewall stops logging; (4) map to firewall inventory CM-8.
visualization: Table (firewall, gap), Single value (devices silent), Time chart (EPS trend)
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic by All_Traffic.dest | sort - count

references.title: Palo Alto Networks Add-on for Splunk

knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
